surveys.title: Employee Engagement Survey
surveys.desc: Hi Teman Mantan, We're inviting you to take a moment to join our Employee Engagement Survey. This survey is more than just a questionnaire, It is our way of listening to you through your honest thoughts and reflections, we hope to understand what truly matters to you, what helps you grow, and what support you may need in the future. Your voice will guide us in building a workplace where we can learn, thrive, and feel valued together. Thank you for being part of this journey with us. Let's grow better together & always Serving with Heart Notes: This survey collects identifiable responses.

surveys.title: PERMA Evaluation
surveys.desc: Our PERMA Survey is designed to assess your overall wellbeing and happiness at work. The PERMA model, developed by Dr. Martin Seligman, focuses on five key elements: Positive Emotion, Engagement, Relationships, Meaning, and Accomplishment. Your feedback will help us understand your experiences and identify areas where we can enhance your wellbeing. This PERMA model will also become your profile after you complete it.

surveys.title: Kenangan Behavior Pulse Survey
surveys.desc: We're conducting a quick pulse survey to understand how well our core behaviors resonate and are being practiced across the company. Your honest feedback is incredibly valuable as it will help us identify areas for improvement and create targeted initiatives to make Kopi Kenangan an even better place to work. This survey is completely anonymous, and your responses will be kept confidential. It should take a few minutes to complete. Thank you for your participation!

surveys.title: Engagement Survey
surveys.desc: An Employee Engagement Survey helps measure workplace wellbeing and identify areas for growth. For employees, it’s a chance to share thoughts on roles, teamwork, and leadership. By completing this survey, you’re helping us grow together and build a healthy, empowering environment where everyone thrives.
